Title: Dorzagliatin in drug-naïve patients with type 2 diabetes: SEED trial
Key_Finding: HbA1c -1.07% vs placebo -0.50%; no severe hypoglycemia

Title: Dorzagliatin add-on therapy to metformin: DAWN trial
Key_Finding: HbA1c -1.02% vs placebo -0.36% with metformin; safe combination therapy

Title: Efficacy and safety of dorzagliatin: meta-analysis and trial sequential analysis
Key_Finding: Meta-analysis: HbA1c -0.65%; FPG -9.22 mg/dL; improved beta-cell function HOMA2-β +2.69

Title: Dorzagliatin (HMS5552) 28-day biomarker-guided study
Key_Finding: HbA1c -0.79% to -1.22%; improved pancreatic beta-cell function; dual pancreatic-hepatic action

Title: Glucokinase as glucose sensor in pancreatic beta-cells and hepatocytes
Key_Finding: Foundational evidence for glucose-sensing role in beta cells and hepatocytes

Title: Exploring in vivo mechanisms of glucokinase activators in type 2 diabetes
Key_Finding: GKAs lower glucose through liver and pancreatic effects; glucose-dependent mechanism

Title: Molecular targeting of the GK-GKRP pathway in diabetes
Key_Finding: GK-GKRP pathway regulation; hepatocyte-specific activation; dual mechanism pharmacology

Title: Evaluation of efficacy and safety of GKAs: systematic review and meta-analysis

Title: Evaluating overall safety of GKAs in type 2 diabetes
Key_Finding: 17 RCTs (4,918 patients); higher adverse events; hyperlipidemia and hyperuricemia increased; newer GKAs (dorzagliatin) safer than older agents

Title: Efficacy and safety of GKAs for type-2 diabetes: meta-analysis
Key_Finding: HbA1c reduction -0.3%; comprehensive safety analysis older vs newer GKAs

Title: Cost-Effectiveness of Newer Pharmacologic Treatments in Type 2 Diabetes
Key_Finding: GLP-1 agonists and SGLT2i low value as first-line; variable cost-effectiveness newer drug classes

Title: Dorzagliatin: First Approval
Key_Finding: NMPA approval September 2022; first GKA approved globally; monotherapy and metformin add-on indications

Title: Recent drug development of dorzagliatin: review study
Key_Finding: SEED: HbA1c -1.07% post-prandial -2.83 mmol/L; DAWN: HbA1c -1.02% post-prandial -5.45 mmol/L; NRDL inclusion 2024; BLOOM real-world study

Journal: Journal of Epidemiology and Global Health
Title: Epidemiology of Type 2 Diabetes: Global Burden of Disease
Key_Finding: 462 million with T2D (2017); projected 7079 per 100k by 2030; 1M+ deaths/year; 9th leading mortality cause

Journal: Endocrinology & Metabolism Clinics of North America
Title: 100 years of Insulin: Cost and Access
Key_Finding: Insulin prices 3x-27x higher in US vs other countries; 25-30% patients ration/skip due to cost; poor access in low-income countries

Title: Biosimilar and Generic Drug Economics
Key_Finding: Biosimilars can profitably sell 97% less than market price; Semglee $29.60 vs Lantus $85.10; $37B saved via BPCIA
